events.detail: orchestration/ scaffolding created; SQL-Server references scrubbed from System-1 docs + AGENTS.md + ingest_oanda_prices.py; requirements.txt gains python-docx. No MODEL task started.

Phase 0 bootstrap executed. (1) Prereqs: DB connectivity verified via src/common/db.py (get_psycopg2_connection); OANDA practice creds present (OANDA_API_KEY/OANDA_ACCOUNT_ID_DEMO/OANDA_URL); venv /home/emmanuel/Documents/Scalable_Brain/.venv confirmed; Storage/Queue resolved to local defaults, roots created (model-artifacts/, feature-store/, results/state/queue/, results/state/rework/, results/state/blocked/, contracts/). (2) Deps: installed hmmlearn==0.3.3 + mlflow==3.14.0; pyarrow/jsonschema/python-docx satisfied; requirements.txt pinned; mlflow downgraded pandas 3.0.2->2.3.3 & protobuf 7->6 — verified non-breaking via import smoke test. (3) .env pinned to STORAGE_PROVIDER=local/QUEUE_PROVIDER=local + MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI=file:results/state/mlruns. (4) Data baseline recorded: D1=29243, H1=648195, H4=164563, M15=2553691, M30=1280826, W1=0 (absent, as expected). Next: MODEL-001.

MODEL-001 complete; AG-001 PASS 9/9. Added W1 granularity: backfilled 5 forex majors (EUR_USD/GBP_USD/USD_JPY/AUD_USD/USD_CAD), 1068 weekly bars each (2005-12-30..2026-06-12), 5340 rows, 0 quarantined, 0 unexpected gaps, coverage 100%. Additive lineage cols (complete/source/ingest_run_id/ingested_at_utc) + fact_market_prices_quarantine table (idempotent migration). New package src/system1/ingestion/ (schema/dq/reports/orchestrator + 7 passing unit tests) reusing layer-0 OANDA primitives. Minimal additive edits to src/layer0/ingest_oanda_prices.py (W1 interval/chunk/CLI). FIXED LATENT BUG: D1/W1 codes were sent verbatim to OANDA (HTTP 400); added to_oanda_granularity() map (D1->D, W1->W) — also repairs the previously-broken daily fetch path. Idempotency + resumability proven (delete-60/restart -> exact restore to 1068). Legacy H1/H4/D1 + Saturday cron untouched. Next: MODEL-002 (feature store).

MODEL-002 complete; AG-002 PASS 9/9. Built versioned Parquet feature store feature-store/1.0.0 (65 Hive partitions granularity=D1/H4/W1 x year; rows D1=29243, H4=164563, W1=5340; Snappy) with schema.json + lineage.json (3 source ingest_run_ids, git sha, per-partition sha256, warmup null counts) + MLflow run. Features (trailing-only, leakage-free): returns_1(log), atr_14, adx_14, price_position_20 in [0,1], volatility_20; regime_feature_columns=[atr_14,adx_14,volatility_20,returns_1]. New package src/system1/features/ (definitions+pipeline + 6 passing tests) reusing layer0 indicators ATR/ADX. Determinism PROVEN: independent rebuild -> 65/65 partitions byte-identical (sha256). FIXES: granularity/year are partition keys only (not in-file cols) to avoid pyarrow path/file collision; .env MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI moved file:->sqlite (MLflow 3.x rejects file store). Next: MODEL-003 (regime HMM).

MODEL-003 complete; AG-003 PASS 12/12. 4-state Gaussian HMM (Trending-Up/Down, Ranging, High-Vol) on D1/H4/H1 — all three converged to HMM (K-Means fallback retained + proven via forced-failure test). Wrote fact_market_regime_v2 additive cols (regime_model/raw/smoothed, prob_*, model_version) for 841596 rows. models/hmm_model.joblib serialized (per-granularity model+scaler+mapping+weights), reproduces DB predictions exactly; MLflow logged. Method: reuses MODEL-002 feature definitions + derived point-in-time trend_20 (weighted x3) so HMM learns DIRECTION not just vol bands. regime_raw=argmax(semantic-ordered posterior) so argmax(prob)==raw; 3-bar causal persistence smoothing with leading-segment fixup (no <3-bar segments); deterministic state->label mapping by component means (stored). Stability acc D1=0.886/H4=0.970/H1=0.860 (accuracy = out-of-sample regime stability since no human-labeled ground truth). flicker smoothed<raw<kmeans. New package src/system1/regime/ (8 passing tests). Next: MODEL-004 (attribution) + MODEL-006 (gatekeeper, parallel).

BLOCKER IDENTIFIED: fact_signals/fact_trade_outcomes/fact_live_trades/dim_strategy/dim_strategy_registry all EMPTY -> MODEL-004/005/006/007/009 cannot produce meaningful outputs (need upstream Layer 0->2 trade data, outside the 10 MODEL tasks). Per user decision, built the UNBLOCKED work and paused. MODEL-008 complete; AG-008 PASS 9/9. Built pluggable infra: src/common/queue/ (QueueBackend ABC + LocalDurableBackend: durable JSONL, idempotency index, bounded depth+backpressure, DLQ, fsync confirm + factory) and src/common/storage/ (StorageBackend ABC + LocalFSBackend: immutable versions, atomic pointer, sha256 round-trip + GCS stub + factory) = FND-002/FND-001 satisfied locally. MODEL-008 producer src/system1/queue_producer/ (schema-validated messages, deterministic idempotency keys, backpressure never-drop, DLQ with reasons, publisher confirms, metrics) + contracts/signal-message-contract.json + 7 passing tests. Decoupling verified: zero Layer-4 imports in src/system1 + src/layer3_ml. Producer is source-agnostic; live DB feed activates once MODEL-006 scores exist. PAUSED per user choice 'build unblocked work then pause'.

BLOCKER RESOLVED (user option a). Built src/layer0/persist_trade_outcomes.py reusing the Layer 0 backtest engine (get_all_strategies + BacktestEngine + preload_historical_data): seeded dim_strategy + dim_strategy_registry (10 strategies) and persisted 66743 backtested trades to fact_trade_outcomes (H1=57475, H4=9268, ~38% win). Fixed FK: fact_trade_outcomes.strategy_id references dim_strategy_registry (not dim_strategy) -> seed both. THEN MODEL-004 complete; AG-004 PASS 7/7. Built src/system1/attribution/ (metrics+schema+attribute, 6 tests): point-in-time regime tag via merge_asof (regime_smoothed bar<=entry, matching instrument+granularity), 80 cells (strategy×regime×granularity, PORTFOLIO), win_rate/PF/Sharpe/expectancy/MaxDD/avg_r + Bayesian shrinkage (N_min=20) + low_confidence; fact_strategy_regime_attribution + parquet + report + MLflow. 0 UNKNOWN regime; reconciliation OK. NOTE: fact_signals still empty -> run Layer 2 generate_signals before MODEL-006. Next: MODEL-005 (vetting + regime map).

MODEL-005 complete; AG-005 PASS 12/12. Re-ran trade loader at 10y lookback (134520 trades) to clear the OOS>=60mo gate (5y gave 59.8mo). Re-ran MODEL-004 attribution. Applied strict per-regime gates (PF>=1.5,Sharpe>=0.8,MaxDD<=25%,WinRate>=40%,Recovery>=3.0,OOS>=60mo; low-confidence always rejected). NON-EMPTY regime_strategy_map.json: Trending-Down/Ranging/High-Vol 1 qualifier each; Trending-Up starved (listed in empty_regimes). strategy_weights.json weights sum to 1 per regime. Composite rank 0.5*sharpe+0.3*pf+0.2*recovery-maxdd. Both artifacts schema-validated (contracts/regime-map + weights). rejection_summary pf72/sharpe67/maxdd70/winrate48/recovery72/oos0/lowconf2. dim_strategy_registry.is_qualified updated. New src/system1/vetting/ (6 tests). Legacy aggregate vetting untouched. Next: MODEL-007 (serializer).

MODEL-007 complete; AG-007 PASS 9/9. src/system1/serializer/serialize.py bundles hmm_model.joblib(003)+strategy_weights.json+regime_strategy_map.json(005)+model_metadata.json+checksums.sha256 into immutable model-artifacts/{bundle_version}/ via pluggable StorageBackend; atomic latest.json flip ONLY after per-object SHA256 round-trip verify; retention keeps last 5; refuses promotion on missing artifact/checksum mismatch/empty regime map/secret detected. Round-trip + atomic-pointer-on-interrupt + retention + empty-map-refusal all proven. 4 tests. GCS attaches by config (STORAGE_PROVIDER=gcs), no code change. Next: MODEL-009 (retraining scheduler).

MODEL-009 complete; AG-009 PASS 10/10. CRITICAL PATH 001->002->003->004->005->007->009 COMPLETE. src/system1/scheduler/: triggers.py (Sun 00:00 UTC + 14d Sharpe<0.3/regime acc<70%/circuit-breaker, cooldown debounce, fail-safe on missing metrics) + orchestrator.py (single-flight O_EXCL lock, deployment gates incl must-beat-incumbent, gated atomic promote via MODEL-007, retrain_state.json+retrain_log_*.json lineage, MLflow). shell/cron_system1_retrain.sh. 8 tests. Degraded candidate not promoted; passing candidate atomically promoted (verified real bundle flip); interrupted promote leaves incumbent unchanged. Remaining: MODEL-006 (blocked on fact_signals -> needs dim_strategy_config + Layer 2 generate_signals) + MODEL-010 (P3 optional, needs 006).

MODEL-006 complete; AG-006 PASS 9/9. Resumed from prior session: found a complete-looking gatekeeper (champion triad + src/system1/gatekeeper/{train,thresholds}.py) but artifacts were STALE vs committed train.py (manifest n_folds=3 vs code N_FOLDS=5). Trust-but-verify: re-ran upstream AG-003 on live DB -> still GREEN (all HMM, 4 states populated, prob_*=1.0 every row, argmax==regime_raw 0 violations, D1/H4/H1 present, hmm-v1.0.0, atr/adx non-null). Trade data confirmed: fact_trade_outcomes 134520 trades (H1=115754,H4=18766), win 0.384. Re-ran `python -m src.system1.gatekeeper.train` (background, ~7min). XGBoost gatekeeper (GridSearchCV: lr0.03/depth5/n200/sub0.7, scale_pos_weight for imbalance) on point-in-time frame (merge_asof backward: regime bar<=entry, 0/134520 look-ahead). Features=[atr_value,adx_value,prob_trending_up/down/ranging/high_vol,volatility_regime,trending_strength,adx_over_atr]+OneHot[regime_smoothed,strategy_id,entry_signal_type]. Regime-aware dynamic thresholds (HV0.55/Rng0.60/TrDn0.45/TrUp0.50/fallback0.60) calibrated within turnover band [0.05,0.60]. 5-fold expanding walk-forward OOS uplift=+0.031902, p=0.0001 (20k bootstrap permutation), significant=True, OOS approval 29.6% (33134/78966) -> promotion gate passes, non-degenerate. Champion triad + SHA256 + legacy fallback contract preserved (Layer 4 loader unchanged). MLflow run 8d63aa5be05642da877715c0da2169d0 (experiment system1-gatekeeper). AG-006 self-audit 9/9 + version alignment (feature_set_version 1.0.0, regime_model_version hmm-v1.0.0). ALL REQUIRED SYSTEM-1 TASKS (MODEL-001..009) DONE. Only MODEL-010 (P3 optional FinBERT) remains.
